subcodes.first_line: O friends of the One True God! Today the sea surgeth with another wave, and the sun shineth with supreme effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان خداوند یکتا امروز دریا بموجی دیگر ظاهر و آفتاب بنور اعظم مشرق از
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition
